label: Adjust colour temperature
description: Allows for the control of the relative color temperature of light device in step size.

stepColorTemperatureByPercent.label: Adjust colour temperature
stepColorTemperatureByPercent.description: Change the color temperature by the given percentage. If it exceeds the minimum or maximum range then it will be clamped to those values.

stepSize.description: The amount of change from the current color temperature as a percentage within the device's minimum and maximum range.
